insight: Strong week — you closed it out with a 3 km Tempo run tonight (TE 3.2, avg 173 bpm, max 190 bpm), which tells you your aerobic base is being pushed hard. That TE of 3.2 maps squarely into the 'impacting' zone, so recovery tonight is non-negotiable. Looking back at the week: you correctly split your Apr 29 session into a Treadmill Run + Strength block — that's the right structure when you're doubling up. Your Apr 30 and Apr 28 Strength sessions are building good frequency on the weights side. One flag: back-to-back Strength on Apr 28 and Apr 30, followed by a Treadmill Run on Apr 29 sandwiched in between, is a high-load three-day window. Watch for accumulated fatigue — if your HRV or resting HR trends up this week, dial back intensity before Thursday. Priority for next 7 days: one Zone 2 easy run (below 155 bpm), one progressive strength session, and get at least 7h sleep on your recovery nights.
